heading: Administration
label: 79i Administration
text: The Secretary shall administer the Redwood National Park in accordance with the provisions of the Act of (, ), as amended and supplemented.August 25, 191639 Stat. 53516 U.S.C. 1–41See References in Text note below.1
notes: References in TextThe Act of (, ), referred to in text, is , , known as the National Park Service Organic Act, which enacted sections 1, 2, 3, and 4 of this title and provisions set out as a note under , National Park Service and Related Programs. Sections 1 to 4 of the Act were repealed and restated as , Crimes and Criminal Procedure, and section 100101(a), chapter 1003, and sections 100751(a), 100752, 100753, and 102101 of Title 54 by , §§ 3, 4(a)(1), 7, , , 3260, 3272. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.
